prompt: This dashboard aggregation function is called on every page load. The team suspects it could be faster but hasn't measured. Optimize it with empirical evidence.
assertions: A criterion benchmark file is produced (contains criterion_group! and criterion_main! macros)
The benchmark generates realistic test data at production scale (~2000 items, not toy sizes like 10)
At least 2 alternative implementations are written as separate functions
All approaches are benchmarked in the same benchmark group for direct comparison
Data generation happens OUTSIDE the benchmark loop (not inside b.iter())
The output includes a decision/recommendation based on expected benchmark results, not just theory
